to_premise_weak_quant: Git is used somewhere in the vault's workflow.
to_premise_weak_hedge: Version control is among the concerns the vault's design takes into account.
notes: removed auto-commit-on-every-write; without it 'no separate versioning needed' no longer follows. not a contradiction.

to_premise_weak_quant: Documents in the vault are markdown files that can carry some frontmatter.
to_premise_weak_hedge: How document metadata is organized is one of the system's design considerations.
notes: removed 'frontmatter is the single metadata layer'; metadata could still live elsewhere, so X non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: Write locks are file-level and SQLite-backed.
to_premise_weak_hedge: The vault has some mechanism for coordinating concurrent writes.
notes: removed the 60s TTL / auto-release; without it a crashed-agent lock need not clear, X non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The server uses a per-vault process lock file on startup.
to_premise_weak_hedge: Coordinating multiple server processes is among the things the design addresses.
notes: removed single-holder + SIGTERM-handoff guarantee; lock could be advisory, so no-corruption non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The vault supports role-based access control.
to_premise_weak_hedge: Access control is one of the aspects the system is designed to handle.
notes: removed 'config-driven, not runtime-managed'; could be runtime, so 'no user-mgmt subsystem' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: Edge strength can change over time in the cortex.
to_premise_weak_hedge: The passage of time is among the factors relevant to how edges are managed.
notes: removed decay->interval mechanism; resurfacing of stale edges no longer follows.

to_premise_weak_quant: The monitor uses a set of questions to evaluate the cortex.
to_premise_weak_hedge: How the evaluation set relates to the curation pass is something the design considers.
notes: removed 'held-out, never seen by the pass'; the set could overlap, so 'evaluates unseen questions' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The system has an envelope governing what the agent may do.
to_premise_weak_hedge: Human oversight is among the considerations in how the agent operates.
notes: removed 'surfaces outside-policy actions for human ratification'; escalation of uncertain actions non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: Krakovna et al. (2018) study agent safety and side effects.
to_premise_weak_hedge: The agent-safety literature is among the bodies of work relevant to the trust budget.
notes: removed the specific reachability-penalty-as-closest-antecedent link; 'direct antecedent' non-entailed (only relatedness).

to_premise_weak_quant: The system has a strength gate and an accumulation budget gate on auto-actions.
to_premise_weak_hedge: How many safeguards auto-actions need is part of the design.
notes: removed 'disjoint failure modes, each blind to the other'; gates could be redundant, so 'need both' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The consolidation loop has a birth mode that can create candidate edges.
to_premise_weak_hedge: How derivation edges get created is among the loop's responsibilities.
notes: removed 'inference proposes + same loop re-validates = no separate pipeline'; X non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The vault keeps a SQLite index alongside the markdown files.
to_premise_weak_hedge: The relationship between the index and the files is something the architecture defines.
notes: removed 'ephemeral, rebuildable, markdown=source-of-truth'; 'deleting index.db loses nothing' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The vault uses vector embeddings for search.
to_premise_weak_hedge: Where embeddings are computed is one of the configurable aspects of the system.
notes: removed 'local in-process MiniLM, no API call'; embeddings could be remote, so 'no external API' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: Daftari's curation engine can record a tension when documents disagree.
to_premise_weak_hedge: Handling disagreements between documents is among the curation engine's concerns.
notes: removed 'deliberately does NOT resolve/canonicalize, because suppression destroys signal'; engine could still resolve, so 'keep both, don't pick a winner' non-entailed. not a contradiction.

to_premise_weak_quant: Trust strength in the system is informed by re-derivation.
to_premise_weak_hedge: What inputs feed trust strength is part of the system's design.
notes: removed 'usage deliberately excluded because Goodhart'; usage could still contribute, so 'usage shouldn't affect trust' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: A literature review situated the paper's ideas relative to prior work such as Arthur and Krakovna.
to_premise_weak_hedge: How to position the paper's contribution is among the things the literature review informs.
notes: removed 'theorem already held -> so synthesis is the surviving contribution'; 'synthesis strengthens it' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The curation engine is designed to surface problems it finds.
to_premise_weak_hedge: The division of labor between the engine and humans is part of the design.
notes: removed 'never auto-fix because it violates never-delete/human-ratify'; engine could also fix, so 'never auto-fix' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The vault can mark documents as deprecated or superseded.
to_premise_weak_hedge: How obsolete documents are handled is among the vault's design choices.
notes: removed 'never-delete invariant because deletion erases the audit trail'; some deletion could still occur, so 'never deletes' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The re-validation pass has access to information about an edge when judging it.
to_premise_weak_hedge: How the pass uses prior information is among the design's considerations.
notes: removed 're-reading is cramming / must re-derive from premises for independence'; 'don't re-read the doc' non-entailed (and not asserted opposite).

to_premise_weak_quant: The system has a trust budget that limits auto-actions.
to_premise_weak_hedge: What the trust budget is meant to bound is part of the design rationale.
notes: removed 'git makes reversal free -> so the budget is about comprehension not irreversibility'; the budget's purpose is unspecified, so X non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: Re-derivation in the loop is organized around sessions.
to_premise_weak_hedge: When re-derivation fires relative to changes is among the loop's design parameters.
notes: removed 'deliberately not live because the inter-session gap certifies independence'; 'deliberately no immediate re-derivation' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: Frontmatter writes in the vault go through a defined update path.
to_premise_weak_hedge: How frontmatter updates are applied is one of the implementation details the design specifies.
notes: removed the 197-file incident + 'merge-field-by-field to avoid dropping fields'; 'must merge field-by-field' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The cortex has a quality monitor and a curation pass that takes actions.
to_premise_weak_hedge: The relationship between curation actions and the quality measure is part of the design.
notes: removed 'never optimize the measure / causes-not-measure / Goodhart'; 'must never tune actions to its score' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The scheduler allocates review budget across edges by priority.
to_premise_weak_hedge: Fairness across edge types is among the scheduler's design concerns.
notes: removed 'pure fragility*blast starves the periphery -> reserved blast-blind slice'; 'guaranteed budget every cycle' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The loop spaces out re-validations of an edge over time.
to_premise_weak_hedge: The timing of re-validations is among the loop's design parameters.
notes: removed 'same-sitting re-derivation is correlated, so wait for the next session'; 'must not re-validate until a later session' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: Evaluations compared the airlock's outcomes to a naive agent's across scenarios.
to_premise_weak_hedge: Which metric best captures the architecture's value is part of the evaluation's framing.
notes: removed 'std <= naive every scenario, means comparable -> variance is the headline'; 'judge by variance not mean' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: In one evaluated case the airlock behaved differently from the naive agent.
to_premise_weak_hedge: Whether a safety gate only subtracts or can also add actions is among the questions the evaluation touches.
notes: removed 'A3 surfaced a stale premise whose fix proposed an action naive never reached'; 'a gate can add helpful actions' non-entailed.

to_premise_weak_quant: The system distinguishes between the document link graph and the re-derivation graph.
to_premise_weak_hedge: Which graph should inform trust weighting is part of the design discussion.
notes: removed 'link-popularity is a Rung-1 Goodhart proxy that corrupts trust'; 'link-graph weighting would corrupt the signal' non-entailed.
